why_it_matters: An additional long-acting opioid materially adds to her already heavy multi-opioid burden, and omission risks unrecognized opioid stacking, oversedation, and worsened constipation.
A concrete near-term nurse visit date operationalizes the care plan and ensures timely reassessment of pain and bowel function; omission leaves the follow-up interval ambiguous.
Documenting that an H&P note exists is administrative metadata that does not change clinical management of this visit.
